transcript.text:
[Now arriving at our last station: Tzuyang Station]
[Please be prepared to step off]
[Thank you for using our Sushi Train service]
[Goodbye]
[But this train...]
[Does not have a stop]
[Arrived]
[A shocking and horrifying ride]
[We had X number of passengers on board]
[All aboard the Sushi Train]
[Surrounded by tall buildings]
Hello everyone
I'm here at Guro Digital Complex's 2nd station today
to have some conveyor belt sushi
This place is very famous
Full of reviews Like over 1,000

They've been here for 17 years
It's located in this building.
Let's head inside
[Downstairs underground]
There were so many customers earlier so I came right when their break-time ended.
[Choi Wooyoung Sushi] [Seoul, Guro-gu]
Hello~
So excited
Let's set-up first
[He's seen her sushi mukbang]
Our pieces are much bigger
What's this? This is...
My goal is to try everything
Beef sirloin sushi
All plates are 2,300 Won each (~$1.62 USD)
The quality of their sushi is really good

These are so big too
Too big for 1-bite
So good
Really...
It's like...
Thank you
Scallop
It just melts in my mouth So soft
[There's no time to waste]
It's tuna
With amazing quality
It just melts
Raw shrimp
I love these
Exciting
The smokey flavor...

It's going to be great
Red sea bream
Check these out
Dipped in soy sauce
Its texture is chewy
PD nim, eel please!
[It will come back to us anyway...]
Can't let eels go
Flying fish roe
This is the standard for sushi
The dried seaweed is not soggy Crispy and tasty
So good
Ankimo sushi (monkfish liver)
[She can't stay still...]
Monkfish liver...
I've never seen that before

It feels like tuna mayo.
But it's more flavorful
Mackerel over here
It feels like the outside was seared
I have to eat the eel
These are freshwater eels
Delicious I love it
Egg sushi
These are like 2 times bigger than regular ones
The egg is sweet and tasty
Almost like a dessert
Swordfish too
Yummy
These rice have small pieces of pickled radish inside
I love how big the pieces are
The workers made bets with each other.

Around 80 plates?
[Will she eat over 80 plates?]
Salmon belly
These are regular halibut
I love abalone
These clams are so good
Crunchy
Uni? The color is different
We added our own seasoning
How do I explain this?
It feels refreshing
[Seeing what she didn't have...]
Almost all of them
Horned turban shell
Marinated prawn
Cuttlefish too

Soy sauce marinated prawn
They rarely have these tuna otoro plates
Looks great, right?
1, 2, 3
I grabbed more plates when the camera was off
Rare item
Just these 2...
Eels are so good
Beef sirloin
2,300 Won for each plate That's very cheap
This beef tartare has been sitting here
So good
I've took all the eels
Currently at 33 plates
[1 plate per minute?] It hasn't even been 30 minutes
2 plates at a time then

Thank you
3 pieces on here, so let's add 2 plates.
[So she can pay for them]
These pieces are huge
Jumbo eel sushi
It's freshly cooked So delicious
These tasted like the sauce But these were very smokey
So big
So cost-efficient
These pieces are so big And 2,300 Won per plate...
Insane
These thick sushi pieces explode with flavor and fish oil as soon as you bite into it
And the price...
So good
This plate is still steaming
[They re-heated it for her]

This tastes completely different
I haven't had salmon yet
Thank you.
I only want beef sirloin and eel right now
These are so good
Half-time dessert
25 plates each tower? Now it's even
Huge fin meat
I must have the shrimp tempura when they're hot and fresh
I'm lucky
3 big pieces instead of 2
These clams are great
12 here
Thank you
I used to only like fish sushi
But my taste buds have changed I like expensive meats now

Stop looking at eels
I've never seen anyone eat over 50 plates here
I still can't believe this.
[The owner is lost for words...]
Amazing
[Never seen anything like this...]
[Miso soup tower on the right...]
For me? Thank you
Oh my...
-Can you eat more? -Yes I can.
[Omg]
10 bowls
We started cooking the eels for the customers starting today
I'm so lucky!
They started doing this today and I happened to visit here today
Freshly cooked eel

I bet on 80 plates...
-Did someone bet higher? -Yes, 100
Someone bet 100 plates But the pieces are so big
So definitely harder than other restaurants
What is this thing floating?
Abalone gut sushi? I've never seen this
I eat intestines but not 3 at once
Yum
Thank you
Wow Abalone gut porridge
So thick
This is crazy
So flavorful
They can make it this thick only because they sell a lot of abalone
Porridge that costs only 2,300 Won
We do give salt for these, but it tastes better with our house soy sauce

Sesame oil as well
[Mix mix]
This is it
I have to come here again for this
I think only the regulars would know about this.
What else is on the secret menu?
A bowl of udon, please
So tasty
[Counting again]
[96 so far].
I would've passed 100 by now But I had so many miso soups
98 now
Let's end the last 2 with eel
Thank you.
This udon does not look 2,300 Won
Lots of food too

For the finale
Eel sushi
Last plate
100th
That's incredible
[100 plates?]
[Thumbs up]
Thanks everyone
[Tally up]
100 indeed
I'm shocked
She's writing history
[Thank you for a meal that was also for the books!] [Subtitles by Anthony Hyun Choi] [antchoi91@gmail.com]
